docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY SAAD, PAMELA AS TO DEFENDANT KINMAN, MICHELE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAAD, PAMELA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-27-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KINMAN, MICHELE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2011 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAAD, PAMELA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KINMAN, MICHELE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
